trajectory.title: My journey
trajectory.p1: My career in software development began about 7 years ago, and since then I have dedicated myself to building and maintaining web applications with a strong focus on the backend. Throughout this time, I have worked with technologies like PHP, Laravel, Vue.js, React, SQL Server, MySQL, and PostgreSQL, among others.
trajectory.p2: Starting as a backend developer, I gradually expanded my skill set across the full stack, always seeking to understand how each piece fits together to deliver functional, efficient, and scalable solutions. I enjoy taking on new technical challenges that push me to keep learning and improving my craft.

stack.title: My stack
stack.clickHere: Click here to see all my projects created with {tech}.

hobbies.title: My hobbies
hobbies.description: Life isn't only about compiling code and optimization. When I step away from the keyboard, I immerse myself in creative activities, active sports, and gaming to keep my mind sharp and inspired.

descriptions.music: A constant companion that inspires me, nurtures my creativity, and allows me to connect with different cultures and emotions.
descriptions.videogames: A hobby that has been with me since childhood, helping me relax and unwind while keeping stress at bay.
descriptions.basketball: Basketball has been an important part of my youth, and I have greatly enjoyed playing and following the sport since my teenage years.
descriptions.anime: A hobby that has become part of who I am. I enjoy immersing myself in its stories, characters, and imaginative worlds.
descriptions.pingpong: My most recent hobby. I enjoy playing it with friends in a casual setting—not competitively, but simply for fun and good company.
